view.title: Magical Parchment {id}
view.subject: Subject
view.emailDisabled: Thy ethereal address ({email}) hath been hexed. Prithee consult
view.allowServerAccess: Allow InterServer to alter iron golem:
view.ipHelpText: If binding is coming from a different ether address, prithee alter it.
view.passwordEncrypted: Incantations are stored in a separate warded vault.
view.ticketClosed: This magical parchment is sealed, so scroll responses are forbidden. If thou still requirest assistance, feel free to manifest a new parchment and we shall be glad to aid thee.
view.replyHint: Creating separate parchments for new issues helps the council prioritize and resolve them faster.
view.closeConfirmText: Dost thou wish to seal this magical parchment?

new.title: New Magical Parchment
new.subject: Subject
new.subjectValidation: Prithee enter a brief description about the issue.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: The guild thanks thee for helping us maintain an orderly arcane support system by submitting one request per parchment.
new.descriptionValidation: Prithee enter a detailed description about the issue.
new.fileNote: Note: Only sigil files - gif/jpeg/png types are permitted.
new.allowAccessLabel: I permit InterServer to access my iron golem and perform alterations
new.accessNote: Prithee note: By opening a support parchment, InterServer may need to access, divine, or alter files in thy grimoire. This requirement is needed in order to provide arcane support. Prithee only proceed if thou dost agree.
